PreToolUse.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(node_modules|package-lock\.json|\.env)' && echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit this file' && exit 1 || exit 0

PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.(astro|ts|mjs|css|md)"'; then npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
PostToolUse.description: Validate Astro build after source file changes
